description:
Configure Area Code Caller ID (AC-CID) for the 'Northeast Presence' campaign (ID: NEASTPRS) to enable local presence dialing. Enable the AC-CID feature for the campaign and implement the following six Area Code to Caller ID mappings:

- Area Code 212 -> Caller ID: 2125559901 (New York)
- Area Code 617 -> Caller ID: 6175559902 (Boston)
- Area Code 215 -> Caller ID: 2155559903 (Philadelphia)
- Area Code 860 -> Caller ID: 8605559904 (Hartford)
- Area Code 609 -> Caller ID: 6095559905 (Trenton)
- Area Code 203 -> Caller ID: 2035559906 (Bridgeport)
